artPrompt: Two small chests of glinting coins half-hidden beneath a humble pretzel cart in a shadowed alley, warm lamplight catching the gold while soft pretzels pile innocently above; smoky brown haze and ink-black walls wrap the scene, a goblin's hand sliding the lid shut, the magical sleight of dirty money becoming snack revenue rendered with tender melancholy, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Laundered Through the Snack Cart
text:
Create two Treasure tokens. They are technically pretzel revenue.
If you control a snack or the table snack is in front of you, create a third Treasure and draw a card. The books say it's all hot dog money. The books are lying. The books are also on fire.
flavorText: Forty thousand dollars of soft pretzels sold to no one in particular.
